title: GoKarts
description: Zip around your Minecraft world with these multiplayer-friendly GoKarts!
body: # GoKarts: --- ![Red GoKart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c1aa91ac55ae860cbe9e9a09c97e81e8ac6fa14.png) This datapack adds four GoKarts to your Minecraft world! Race your friends, or use them to get around quickly. --- There are (for now) 4 different colors of GoKarts. Red, Blue, Lime, and Pink. To craft a GoKart, simply use 2 black concrete, 1 iron block, 1 redstone, and 3 of your chosen color's concrete in a crafting table like this: ![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a3838faa1e0b9921087b99482619c8a215856fa.gif) --- Once you place down your GoKart, you can hop in with a right click or destroy it with a left click. When inside, hold forward to go forward, left and right to steer, as well as backwards to reverse or brake. You can also honk your horn by right clicking the steering wheel! The GoKart can go up slabs, so make sure to adjust your track accordingly! *BONUS: Driving over lime green glazed terracotta will give you a speed boost! ![GoKarts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bd7e70faa2de0a833f2c58038824424bddfc4f8_0.webp) --- Looking for a Minecraft server to race your friends on? Use my affiliate link and use code LAUNCH for 25% off! ---
